description: Project Steward lifecycle hooks for Claude Code. Hooks prefer the bundled pure-Python launcher at ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/project-steward, fall back to an installed project-steward CLI, and never install dependencies automatically.

hooks.command: python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/project-steward" hook session-start --agent claude || project-steward hook session-start --agent claude || true
hooks.commandWindows: py -3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}\bin\project-steward" hook session-start --agent claude; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}\bin\project-steward" hook session-start --agent claude }; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { project-steward hook session-start --agent claude }; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit 0 }

hooks.command: python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/project-steward" hook post-tool-use --agent claude || project-steward hook post-tool-use --agent claude || true
hooks.commandWindows: py -3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}\bin\project-steward" hook post-tool-use --agent claude; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}\bin\project-steward" hook post-tool-use --agent claude }; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { project-steward hook post-tool-use --agent claude }; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit 0 }

hooks.command: python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/project-steward" hook user-prompt-submit --agent claude || project-steward hook user-prompt-submit --agent claude || true
hooks.commandWindows: py -3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}\bin\project-steward" hook user-prompt-submit --agent claude; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}\bin\project-steward" hook user-prompt-submit --agent claude }; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { project-steward hook user-prompt-submit --agent claude }; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit 0 }

hooks.command: python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/project-steward" hook stop --agent claude || project-steward hook stop --agent claude || true
hooks.commandWindows: py -3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}\bin\project-steward" hook stop --agent claude; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}\bin\project-steward" hook stop --agent claude }; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { project-steward hook stop --agent claude }; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit 0 }

hooks.command: python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/project-steward" hook pre-compact --agent claude || project-steward hook pre-compact --agent claude || true
hooks.commandWindows: py -3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}\bin\project-steward" hook pre-compact --agent claude; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}\bin\project-steward" hook pre-compact --agent claude }; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { project-steward hook pre-compact --agent claude }; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit 0 }

hooks.command: python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/project-steward" hook session-end --agent claude || project-steward hook session-end --agent claude || true
hooks.commandWindows: py -3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}\bin\project-steward" hook session-end --agent claude; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}\bin\project-steward" hook session-end --agent claude }; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { project-steward hook session-end --agent claude }; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit 0 }
